title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Cursor's VP of Engineering discusses how agent systems can be deployed across the entire software development lifecycle to overcome the 40% productivity plateau. The talk covers agentic workflows for bug triage, security review, growth experimentation, and organizational changes needed to scale agents beyond code generation.
